text: what is the ROI of the project

Based on the financial analysis provided in the Detailed Project Report, the **Internal Rate of Return (IRR)**, which is a key indicator of a project's profitability and can be considered analogous to ROI in project evaluations, is:

| Metric | Value | Reference |
| :------------------ | :------- | :--------------- |
| **IRR (Internal Rate of Return)** | **43%** | (page: 14, S.N. 2.13) |

This **43% IRR** indicates a strong return on the investment for the **Establishment of a Goatery Unit (100+4 unit)**, demonstrating the project's financial viability.
